title: agropyron glaucum var. intermedium
intro: Agropyron glaucum var. intermedium, also known as intermediate blue wheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheatgrass family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties. Additionally, the plant's leaves can be eaten as a salad green or juiced for their nutritional benefits, providing a rich source of vitamins and minerals.
